---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Ross Cunning"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)


df <- readxl::read_xlsx("Sand Bypass Water Quality Reports.xlsx")
df


df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(c(Sample_Depth, Turbidity_NTU, Difference), as.numeric),
         across(c(Sample_Number), factor))

df

ggplot(df, aes(x = Date, y = Turbidity_NTU)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Sample_Type, shape = Sample_Number)) +
  facet_wrap(~Depth)

df2 <- df %>%
  select(Date, Sample_Type, Sample_Number, Depth, Turbidity_NTU) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Sample_Type, values_from = Turbidity_NTU) %>%
  mutate(diff = `Mixing Zone Compliance` - `Mixing Zone Background`)
  

ggplot(df2, aes(x = Date, y = diff)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Sample_Number)) +
  #geom_boxplot(aes(group = Date)) +
  facet_wrap(~Depth) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.05)
```
